name: Coffee Rum Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt, butter or margarine, and vanilla to the saucepan.
2. Combine sugar, milk, light cream, corn syrup, coffee powder, and salt in the prepared saucepan.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Cook without stirring until it reaches the soft-ball stage (236°F), about 12 to 15 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and add rum flavoring.
6. Cool the mixture to lukewarm (110°F).
7. Beat vigorously with a wooden spoon until the candy begins to hold its shape and loses its glossy appearance, about 10 minutes.
8. Turn the mixture into a buttered 8x8x2-inch dish.
9. Score the surface in squares using a small knife; top each square with a walnut half.
10. Cover the dish with clear plastic wrap and chill thoroughly.
11. Cut through the candy completely along the scored lines to serve.
12. Makes about 1 1/2 pounds.
